error_signature: collections not auto-refreshed on page load
title: Xano collections not refreshing on page load
symptom: Dynamic collections from Xano do not display updated data when the page loads. Users must manually click 'Reload data' to refresh the collections.
not_this_if: Collections refresh correctly without manual intervention
root_cause: The default behavior of the data grid may not automatically trigger a fetch for the latest data from Xano on page load. This can occur if the data fetching logic is not set to execute during the page load event.
fix_steps: Add a 'fetch collections in parallel' action to the workflow
Save the workflow and test the page load
agent_instruction: Set up an 'On page load' workflow to fetch collections in parallel.
